rulings.Case Title: TONY K FONG VS. HUANZHI JIANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Order Granting Plaintiffs Tony K. Fongs Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Admission, Special Interrogatories And Form Interrogatories, And For Sanctions Against Defendant Huanzhi Jiang
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday February 18, 2016, line 4. DEFENDANT HUANZHI JIANG Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Order Granting Plaintiffs Tony K. Fongs Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Admission, Special Interrogatories And Form Interrogatories, And For Sanctions Against Defendant Huanzhi Jiang Hearing Required. Defendant to provide supplemental declaration no later than 9:00 a.m. on February 18, 2016 addressing the following: (1) the date defendant learned that discovery was served on her; (2) manner in which she was notified of the discovery and whether she received copies of the discovery to be responded to; (3) attach copies of the tickets for September - October trip to China; (4) attach a copy of the verified responses to Requests for Admission. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL VS. CHUCK M. POST ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday February 18, 2016, line 5. DEFENDANT LEM-RAY PROPERTIES I DE, LLC, CHUCK POST DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR and Defendant is given additional 30 days to respond to the complaint. Plaintiff failed to comply with its obligations under CCP 430.41(a)(1) ("[t]he party who filed the complaint, cross-complaint, or answer shall provide legal support for its position that the pleading is legally sufficient ") until filing of the opposition to the demurrer. The Court, therefore, construes the opposition to be Plaintiff's response to Defendants' meet and confer efforts. The parties are to immediately engage in further meet and confer in light of the Plaintiff's ultimate compliance with CCP 430.41(a)(1). = (501/REQ)
